review_text: Can't upload a file since the latest update. Worked fine before.
Notifications stopped working after version 3.1.0 update.
Data disappeared after upgrading to 2.1.0. Very frustrating.
Suggestion: add tablet support. Competing apps already have this.
It would be great if you could export data as PDF. Missing that feature.
The recent update improved performance a lot. Great work!
